name: Banana Bread - Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
Leftovers keep well in the refrigerator and can be sliced and toasted before serving again. Banana Bread also freezes well. Use overripe banana.
Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
With the electric beater on low, fluff the shortening until soft and creamy in a small bowl. Beat by hand until fluffy. Add the sugar gradually. Beat in the eggs and dark corn syrup slowly.
Using a fork, beat into the shortening one third of the bananas, half the flour, another third of the bananas, the remaining flour, and the last of the bananas. Fold in the walnut meats. Turn into a greased and floured 1 1/2-quart mold and cover with a loosely fitting plate.
Place the mold on a rack or trivet in the cooker. Cover the cooker, but prop the lid open slightly with a toothpick or a twist of foil to allow excess steam to escape. Cook on High for 2 to 3 hours, or until done.
Cool on a rack for 10 minutes, then turn out the bread from the mold. Dust over with brown sugar and serve warm.
